race.description: Austbrokers Central Coast Provincial Maiden Hcp
race.comment: BRITISH GEM (8) started this prep as favourite over 1300m at Scone but after travelling in the back half of the field could only charge home into third. Ran second over today's journey at Doomben when second-up last prep. Finds a nice race and is sure to make her presence felt. COPARTNER PEGASUS (4) made late inroads to finish fourth when fresh from a spell over 1200m at Gosford recently. Scratched from an earlier race to be saved for this. Handy type who should be thereabouts again. CLASSIC TWO (1) came across from Hong Kong and had his first run in 14 months when an impressive third at Hawkesbury last start. Can improve a lot on that run which puts him in contention. MOANA GOLD (10) was a bit plain last start but can improve on a track with a bit of give. DWIGHT (2) is going okay and some gear changes today might bring him to a new level.
